## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GC-AI and GrowthX to discuss content creation, image generation, and product features for GC-AI's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Calibration articles pending review; feedback expected by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Image generation capabilities discussed; GC-AI to provide brand guidelines and example images](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [GC-AI's unique selling points: in-house legal focus, 3000-line system prompt, multi-model approach, custom PDF parser for accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Content strategy to emphasize positive outcomes and avoid negative connotations](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration and Feedback Process

  - [Two draft articles sent for review; awaiting Cecilia's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Calibration cycle may be slower due to upcoming industry event](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Team open to flexible meeting times to discuss feedback live if needed](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Emphasis on getting the tone right before ramping up content production](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)

### Image Generation for Articles

  - [GrowthX demonstrated AI image generation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [GC-AI to provide brand guidelines (dark theme with white/black accents)](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Plans to create:](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [Cover images](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [In-article images (tweets, posts, news articles)](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [Stat templates for highlighting key figures](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Possibility of auto-generating simple stat images within articles](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

### GC-AI Product Features and Differentiators

  - [Fine-tuned specifically for in-house legal teams from the ground up](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [3000-line system prompt optimized for in-house lawyers](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Uses 5 different AI models, dynamically adjusting based on task](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Custom PDF parser for accurate citations and minimal hallucination](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [EasyPrompt feature for user-friendly prompt creation](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)

### Content Strategy and Tone

  - [Focus on positive outcomes rather than negative pain points](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Avoid explicit mentions of stress or time-consumption; instead, imply benefits](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Incorporate product marketing details into articles (e.g., multi-model approach, PDF parsing)](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Potential for tailored content based on user specialties and industries](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)

### User Adoption and Onboarding

  - [High usage during trial periods](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Need for more robust prompt libraries and use case examples](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Plans to improve trial email sequences with industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

  - [GrowthX to incorporate feedback and refine content approach](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

  - [GrowthX to explore GC-AI tool for content ideation and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Future development of industry-specific prompts and use cases for tailored onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/uXCoAPC8m4azmCwukSRNZCs1rMkMFSWM?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
